da.hero_subtitle: Bliv certificeret yogalærer ved siden af dit job eller studie
da.feat1_desc: 8 uger med undervisning 3-4 gange om ugen. Balanceret tempo der giver tid til fordybelse uden at tage fuld tid.
da.feat2_desc: Undervis rigtige klasser under supervision. Få praktisk erfaring med feedback fra erfarne lærere.
da.feat3_desc: Anatomi, filosofi, sekvensering, justeringer, pranayama, meditation og professionel udvikling. Alt du skal bruge.
da.feat4_desc: Max 20 deltagere per hold. Personlig attention og tæt community. 90%+ gennemførelsesrate.
da.feat5_desc: Fuld RYT-200 certificering. Anerkendt internationalt. Start din karriere med troværdighed.
da.feat6_desc: Adgang til alumni-netværk, fortsættelsesuddannelser og mentorship-programmer efter graduering.
da.curr1_desc: Primære serier, avancerede stillinger, modificationer, props og variationer. Både Vinyasa og Hatha fundamentals.
da.curr2_desc: Muskulatur, skeletstruktur, bevægelsesmekanik, common injuries og skadesforebyggelse. Praktisk anvendt anatomi.
da.curr3_desc: Klasseopbygning, cueing, stemmetræning, assisting, modifications og hvordan man skaber en tryg atmosfære.
da.curr4_desc: Yoga Sutras, Bhagavad Gita, de 8 lemmer, chakras, koshas og yogaens udvikling fra oldtid til nu.
da.curr5_desc: Åndedrætsteknikker, bandhas, meditationsformer og hvordan man integrerer dem i klasser.
da.curr6_desc: Hvordan starter man karriere, business basics, marketing, etik og hvordan man fortsætter sin uddannelse.
da.faq1_q: Skal jeg have erfaring for at starte?
da.faq1_a: Du bør have minimum 6-12 måneders regelmæssig yogapraksis (2-3 gange om ugen). Vi anbefaler at du er fortrolig med basic stillinger og kan holde en 60-minutters klasse.
da.faq2_q: Hvad er forskellen på 8-ugers og de andre formater?
da.faq2_a: 8-ugers semi-intensiv giver dig mere tid end 4-ugers intensiv, men er hurtigere end 18-ugers. Du møder 3-4 gange om ugen. Indholdet og certificeringen er den samme.
da.faq3_a: Ja, mange af vores studerende gør det. Du skal dog afsætte 20-25 timer om ugen inkl. undervisning, hjemmeopgaver og egen praksis.
da.faq4_a: Ja, vi er en registreret Yoga Alliance skole (RYS-200). Du får RYT-200 certificering efter graduation, som er anerkendt globalt.
da.faq5_q: Hvad sker hvis jeg bliver syg eller skal rejse?
da.faq5_a: Du må maks. misse 10% af timerne. Vi tilbyder make-up sessions, og du kan eventuelt færdiggøre i næste hold hvis nødvendigt.
da.faq6_a: Ja - praktisk undervisningseksamen, skriftlig anatomi-test og filosofi-aflevering. Alt er designed til læring, ikke stress. Vi har 90%+ beståelsesrate.
da.final_cta_title: Klar til at Starte din Rejse?
da.final_cta_text: Næste hold starter snart. Få skemaet og ansøg i dag.

en.hero_subtitle: Become a certified yoga teacher alongside your job or studies
en.feat1_desc: 8 weeks with classes 3-4 times per week. Balanced pace that allows time for immersion without going full time.
en.feat2_desc: Teach real classes under supervision. Get hands-on experience with feedback from experienced teachers.
en.feat3_desc: Anatomy, philosophy, sequencing, adjustments, pranayama, meditation and professional development. Everything you need.
en.feat4_desc: Max 20 participants per cohort. Personal attention and close community. 90%+ completion rate.
en.feat5_desc: Full RYT-200 certification. Internationally recognized. Start your career with credibility.
en.feat6_desc: Access to alumni network, continuing education and mentorship programs after graduation.
en.curr1_desc: Primary series, advanced postures, modifications, props and variations. Both Vinyasa and Hatha fundamentals.
en.curr2_desc: Musculature, skeletal structure, biomechanics, common injuries and injury prevention. Practical applied anatomy.
en.curr3_desc: Class structure, cueing, voice training, assisting, modifications and how to create a safe atmosphere.
en.curr4_desc: Yoga Sutras, Bhagavad Gita, the 8 limbs, chakras, koshas and the evolution of yoga from ancient to modern.
en.curr5_desc: Breathing techniques, bandhas, meditation forms and how to integrate them into classes.
en.curr6_desc: How to start your career, business basics, marketing, ethics and how to continue your education.
en.faq1_q: Do I need experience to get started?
en.faq1_a: You should have a minimum of 6-12 months of regular yoga practice (2-3 times per week). We recommend being comfortable with basic postures and able to complete a 60-minute class.
en.faq2_q: What is the difference between the 8-week and other formats?
en.faq2_a: The 8-week semi-intensive gives you more time than the 4-week intensive, but is faster than the 18-week program. You meet 3-4 times per week. The content and certification are the same.
en.faq3_q: Can I work or study at the same time?
en.faq3_a: Yes, many of our students do. However, you should set aside 20-25 hours per week including classes, homework and personal practice.
en.faq4_q: Is the training Yoga Alliance certified?
en.faq4_a: Yes, we are a registered Yoga Alliance school (RYS-200). You receive RYT-200 certification after graduation, which is recognized globally.
en.faq5_q: What happens if I get sick or need to travel?
en.faq5_a: You may miss a maximum of 10% of the hours. We offer make-up sessions, and you can potentially complete with the next cohort if necessary.
en.faq6_a: Yes - practical teaching exam, written anatomy test and philosophy assignment. Everything is designed for learning, not stress. We have a 90%+ pass rate.
en.final_cta_text: Next cohort starts soon. Get the schedule and apply today.
